response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly skilled and experienced software engineer with an impressive track record across multiple domains, this role requires deep expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and GPU/AI accelerator optimization—domains entirely absent from his resume. His 20-year career has been focused on application-level software development (web, mobile, backend services, distributed systems) rather than hardware infrastructure or performance optimization at the silicon/architecture level. This is a fundamental domain mismatch despite his evident seniority.
strengths: Extensive seniority with multiple staff/senior engineer roles across 20 years and mastery of diverse technology stacks
Demonstrated ability to optimize low-latency systems and performance-critical infrastructure (e.g., Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Track record of architectural thinking across complex distributed systems and ability to learn new technical domains
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience—the primary responsibility of this role
Zero evidence of GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or deep learning workload analysis expertise
Entire career trajectory in application-level and backend software development, not hardware infrastructure or performance profiling at the silicon level

key_factors.factor: Seniority level and general technical credibility
